name: Dr. Aris Thorne
bio_html:
As the Program Director, Aris (they/them) shapes the vision for Complexity Coffee. An SFI alum, their research focuses on the emergence of large-scale social structures from individual-level behaviors.

Aris is passionate about making complexity science accessible to a global audience and fostering the next generation of interdisciplinary researchers.

name: Samira Chen
bio_html:
Samira (she/her) is the organizational backbone of Complexity Coffee. She manages event logistics, coordinates with speakers, and ensures every session runs smoothly.

With a background in non-profit management and digital media, Samira is dedicated to building and supporting vibrant academic communities.

name: Leo Kim
bio_html:
Leo (he/him) manages community engagement and outreach. He runs the social media channels, moderates Q&A sessions, and works to connect our audience with speakers and resources.

Leo is a current SFI Postdoctoral Fellow studying information dynamics in social networks.
